message:
test(h3_native): wave 11 – 21 new data-type invariant tests for HTTP/3 primitives

Add pure data-type tests for all 14 pub types in h3_native.rs:
- H3NativeError: Display all 9 variants, Debug/Clone/Eq, std::error::Error
- H3QpackMode: Default/Debug/Copy/inequality
- H3ConnectionConfig: Default/Debug/Copy
- H3UniStreamType: Debug/Copy/Eq, decode all known types, decode unknown rejects
- UnknownSetting: Debug/Clone/Eq
- H3Settings: Default/Debug/Clone, empty roundtrip
- H3Frame: Debug/Clone all 8 variants
- H3ControlState: Default/Debug/Clone, duplicate local+remote settings
- H3PseudoHeaders/H3RequestHead/H3ResponseHead: Debug/Clone/Eq
- QpackFieldPlan: Debug/Clone/Eq

Note: h3_native.rs created by PinkGrove/RainyGate (phases 1-5),
first git-tracked here with CyanBarn's test additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
